comment.body: vol funds leverage when some RV : IV ratio is met (there is a writeup from alma on this somewhere i don't access to atm). But basically because RV has been so low for so long vol funds will buy equities aggressively. When RV then starts to rise that leverage then flips on itself as they de-leverage so the same forces that were assisting the rally then start assisting the selloff. Doesn't mean theres a crash, its more the "rubber band" snapping until liquidity is found. Fiunds are positioned at 635, 620 and 600 (600 is probably the absolute low if we even et threre)
